title: iris officinalis
intro: Iris officinalis, also known as English iris or blue flag, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the iris family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat digestive issues and skin conditions due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Iris officinalis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, reduce inflammation, and improve wound healing. Iris officinalis can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and is also used in some herbal remedies as a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent.
